support.title: Tallafi
support.description: Idan kana da wata matsala ko tambaya game da gayyata, za ka iya tuntuɓar mai haɓakawa:
support.rightsDescription: Za ka iya neman sharewa ko fitar da bayanan sirrinka a kowane lokaci bisa ga ikonka (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPEDA ko POPIA).
support.rightsHint: Za a buɗe abokin imel ɗinka da samfuri da aka riga aka ƙayyade. Hakanan za ka iya rubuta zuwa adriancl2001@gmail.com.
support.ccpaText: Wedingo ba ya sayar da bayanan sirri. Ana amfani da bayanan da aka tattara don sarrafa gayyata kaɗai. Idan kai mazaunin California ne, kana da haƙƙin neman share bayananka da kuma rashin nuna bambanci saboda amfani da haƙƙoƙinka.
support.appDescription: Aikace-aikacen yanar gizo don sarrafa gayyatar aure.
support.copyright: © {{year}} Adrián Carrasco López. Dukkan haƙƙoƙi an kiyaye.
support.deleteEmailBody:
Sannu,

Ina neman a share bayanan sirrina da ke da alaƙa da wannan gayyata:

Sunan baƙo:
Token gayyata (idan ka san shi):

Amfani da haƙƙin shafewa (GDPR Art. 17 / CCPA / LGPD / POPIA).

Na gode.
support.exportEmailBody:
Sannu,

Ina neman a fitar da bayanan sirrina da ke da alaƙa da wannan gayyata:

Sunan baƙo:
Token gayyata (idan ka san shi):

Amfani da haƙƙin ɗauka (GDPR Art. 20).

Na gode.

cookie.title: Yardar cookie
cookie.text: Wedingo yana amfani da ajiya na gida da ake buƙata don aikin gayyata (ajiye zamanka da zaɓuɓɓuka). Ba ma amfani da cookies na ɓangare na uku ko masu bin diddigi.

legal.privacyPolicy:
Mai kula da sarrafa bayanai: Adrián Carrasco López. Lamba: adriancl2001@gmail.com. Manufa: sarrafa gayyatar aure, tabbatar da halarta da sadarwar taron.

Tushen shari'a: yardar mai sha'awa (Art. 6.1.a GDPR). Ana sarrafa bayanan lafiya (allergies na abinci da rashin haƙuri) tare da yarda bayyananniya (Art. 9.2.a GDPR) don daidaita menu na bikin.

Bayanan da aka tattara: suna, zaɓuɓɓukan abinci (allergies da rashin haƙuri), hotuna da aka loda da son rai, bayanan banki idan an bayar da su da son rai.

Masu karɓa: Google LLC (Firebase, Google Cloud Platform) da ke Amurka. Google ya yi rijista ga Ƙa'idodin Kwangila na Standard (SCC) da Hukumar Turai ta amince da su (Shawarar Zartarwa 2021/914) kuma yana da Yarjejeniyar Sarrafa Bayanai (DPA) bisa ga Art. 28 GDPR. Bugu da ƙari, Google ya bi Tsarin Sirrin Bayanai (DPF) EU-US, UK-US da Switzerland-US.

Canja wurin ƙasa da ƙasa: ana ajiye bayanai a sabobin Google Cloud a yankin eur3 (Turai, Frankfurt). Lokacin da ake buƙatar canja bayanai zuwa Amurka, canja wurin yana da kariya ta SCC da takardar shaidar DPF ta Google.

Lokacin ajiya: ana ajiye bayanan baƙi har zuwa watanni 12 bayan ranar taron. Bayan wannan lokacin, za a share su kai tsaye. Ana ajiye bayanan tsarin mahalicci muddin asusun yana aiki.

Haƙƙoƙi: za ka iya amfani da haƙƙoƙin samun dama, gyara, shafewa, ƙuntatawa, ɗauka da adawa ta hanyar rubuta zuwa adriancl2001@gmail.com. Baƙi za su iya neman shafe bayanansu ta nuna sunansu da gayyatarsu. Za mu amsa buƙatarka cikin matsakaicin kwanaki 30.

Haƙƙin janye yarda: za ka iya janye yardarka a kowane lokaci, don tasiri na gaba, ta hanyoyin da aka nuna a sama. Janyewar ba ta shafar halaccin sarrafawar da ta gabata.

Haƙƙin ƙara zuwa hukumar kulawa: a ƙarƙashin GDPR, kana da haƙƙin ƙara zuwa hukumar kare bayanai a cikin ikonka. A Spain: AEPD (www.aepd.es).
legal.termsText:
Amfani da Wedingo yana nufin karɓar waɗannan sharuɗɗan. Wedingo dandamali ne don ƙirƙira da sarrafa gayyatar aure.

Mai amfani ya yarda ba zai yi amfani da dandamalin don dalilai marasa doka ba ko aika abun ciki na cin fuska.

Wedingo ba shi da alhakin abun ciki da masu amfani suka ƙirƙira ko amfanin da baƙi za su yi da bayanan sirrinsu.

Mun riƙe haƙƙin canza waɗannan sharuɗɗan. Za a sanar da canje-canje ta hanyar dandamali.

Ga mazaunan California: idan akwai rikici tsakanin waɗannan sharuɗɗan da CCPA, haƙƙoƙin da CCPA ta bayar za su fifita.
legal.legalText:
Bisa ga biyayya da Mataki na 10 na Dokar 34/2002, na 11 ga Yuli, kan Ayyukan Jama'ar Watsa Labarai da Kasuwancin Lantarki (LSSI-CE), an sanar da cewa:

Mai alhaki: Adrián Carrasco López
Imel: adriancl2001@gmail.com
Manufar gidan yanar: dandamalin gayyatar aure na musamman.

Wannan gidan yanar yana amfani da Firebase (Google LLC) azaman kayan aikin hosting da ajiya, tare da sabobin a Tarayyar Turai.

compliance.title: Rajistar ayyukan sarrafawa (Art. 30 GDPR)
compliance.updated: An sabunta: Yuli 2026. Wannan rajistar tana rubuta ayyukan sarrafa bayanan sirri a cikin Wedingo.
compliance.row1Data: Sunayen ango da amarya, kwanan wata, wuri, jigo, hotuna, kiɗa, menu, sassa
compliance.row2Data: Sunan baƙo, halarta (e/a'a), zaɓin menu, allergies, bayanan lafiya

compliance.row4Data: Token zama, sunan mai amfani admin
compliance.row5Data: Ayyukan superadmin, tokens da aka yi amfani, gayyata da aka share
compliance.internationalText: Ana ajiye bayanai a sabobin Google Cloud a yankin eur3 (Frankfurt, Jamus). Google LLC (Amurka) yana aiki azaman mai sarrafa bayanai ƙarƙashin DPA bisa ga Art. 28 GDPR. Canja wurin zuwa Amurka yana da kariya ta:
compliance.scc: Ƙa'idodin Kwangila na Standard (SCC) - Shawarar Zartarwa 2021/914
compliance.dpf: Tsarin Sirrin Bayanai (DPF) EU-US, UK-US da Switzerland-US
compliance.measureEncryption: ɓoye hotuna da bayanai masu mahimmanci da AES-256-GCM (PBKDF2)
compliance.measureFirestore: Dokokin tsaro na Firestore (sarrafa shiga bisa zamuka)
compliance.measureStorage: Ajiya na gida kaɗan kuma tare da yarda kaɗai
compliance.measureRetention: Manufar ajiya: watanni 12 bayan taron don bayanan baƙi
compliance.measureSuperadmin: Superadmin yana da kariya ta Firebase Authentication + ɓoyayyen hanya
